moments.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 Final Aftermath
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 concluded on July 19th, with the final match results and highlights still a major talking point across the UK.

angles.name: Post-Final Buzz
angles.copy: Still buzzing from the World Cup final? What a tournament it was! Who was your standout player from the whole competition?

angles.name: Reliving the Moments
angles.copy: The confetti has settled, but the memories remain. What was your favourite moment from the FIFA World Cup 2026?

angles.name: Counting Down to 2030
angles.copy: Two days on from the World Cup final, are you already counting down to 2030, or are you still reliving the glory of this year?

moments.title: Don Henley turns 79
moments.blurb: Don Henley, iconic drummer and vocalist for the Eagles, celebrates his 79th birthday today.

angles.name: Eagles Classics
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to Don Henley! From 'Hotel California' to 'The Boys of Summer', what's your favourite Eagles or solo track?

angles.name: Voice Behind Hits
angles.copy: Don Henley, the voice behind so many classics, is 79 today. Which Eagles song instantly takes you back?

angles.name: Legendary Status
angles.copy: Raise a glass to Don Henley, turning 79! The Eagles legend still rocking the airwaves with timeless tunes.

moments.title: Cat Stevens / Yusuf Islam turns 78
moments.blurb: Legendary singer-songwriter Cat Stevens, also known as Yusuf Islam, celebrates his 78th birthday today.

angles.name: Timeless Folk
angles.copy: Happy 78th Birthday to the incredible Cat Stevens! 'Father and Son' or 'Wild World' – which one is your all-time favourite?

angles.name: Poetic Genius
angles.copy: Celebrating the poetic genius of Cat Stevens, 78 today. His songs are timeless, what's your go-to track?

angles.name: Enduring Icon
angles.copy: Yusuf Islam, aka Cat Stevens, turns 78! A true folk icon whose music resonates through generations.

moments.title: Slash turns 61
moments.blurb: Guns N' Roses guitar legend Slash celebrates his 61st birthday on Thursday, July 23rd.

angles.name: GNR Riffs
angles.copy: Get ready to shred! Slash turns 61 on Thursday. What's your favourite GNR riff that only he could deliver?

angles.name: Iconic Guitarist
angles.copy: Happy 61st Birthday to the one and only Slash on Thursday! From 'Sweet Child o' Mine' to 'November Rain', his guitar work is iconic.

angles.name: Top Hat & Riffs
angles.copy: The top hat and the riffs! Slash, the legendary guitarist, celebrates his 61st this week. What's your ultimate Guns N' Roses anthem?

moments.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
moments.blurb: The Rolling Stones' charismatic frontman Mick Jagger will be celebrating his 83rd birthday on Sunday, July 26th.

angles.name: Ageless Rocker
angles.copy: Can you believe Mick Jagger turns 83 this Sunday? Still got the moves! What's your favourite Stones track?

angles.name: Ultimate Frontman
angles.copy: Happy 83rd Birthday to the ageless Mick Jagger this weekend! The ultimate rock 'n' roll frontman.

angles.name: Still Rolling
angles.copy: Still rolling! Mick Jagger celebrates his 83rd birthday on Sunday. What's the best concert you've seen him at?

moments.title: Jennifer Lopez turns 57
moments.blurb: Global superstar Jennifer Lopez will turn 57 on Friday, July 24th.

angles.name: Jenny from the Block
angles.copy: Jenny from the Block turns 57 on Friday! Happy Birthday to the one and only J.Lo. What's your favourite track from her?

angles.name: Decades of Dominance
angles.copy: Celebrate Jennifer Lopez's 57th birthday this week! She's been dominating music, film, and fashion for decades. Which J.Lo era is your favourite?

angles.name: Dance Hits
angles.copy: Happy 57th Birthday to the multi-talented Jennifer Lopez on Friday! Get ready to dance to her biggest hits.

moments.title: Danny Jones turns 40
moments.blurb: McFly guitarist and vocalist Danny Jones celebrates his 40th birthday on Wednesday, July 22nd.

angles.name: McFly Favourites
angles.copy: Happy 40th Birthday to McFly's very own Danny Jones tomorrow! What's your favourite McFly tune?

angles.name: Big 4-0
angles.copy: Danny Jones hits the big 4-0 tomorrow! The McFly star and Voice Kids coach is still rocking. What's your favourite memory of the band?

angles.name: Celebrate Danny
angles.copy: It's Danny Jones' 40th birthday tomorrow! Let's celebrate with some classic McFly.

moments.title: UK Summer School Holidays in Full Swing
moments.blurb: School summer holidays are in full swing across the UK, bringing families to beaches, parks, and attractions.

angles.name: Kids Entertainment
angles.copy: School's out for summer! If you're on holiday or planning a staycation, what's your top tip for keeping the kids entertained?

angles.name: Summer Plans
angles.copy: Glorious summer holidays are here! Where are you off to this year, or are you enjoying the best of Britain?

angles.name: Summer Must-Dos
angles.copy: The great British summer holiday is officially ON. What's the one thing you HAVE to do every summer?

moments.title: Dua Lipa's 'Future Nostalgia (Remix)' hits No.1
moments.blurb: Dua Lipa's latest single, 'Future Nostalgia (Remix),' has soared to the top of the Official UK Singles Chart this week, announced Friday.

angles.name: New No.1
angles.copy: She's done it again! Dua Lipa's 'Future Nostalgia (Remix)' is this week's UK Number One! Are you loving the new sound?

angles.name: Chart Crown
angles.copy: New chart topper! Dua Lipa takes the crown with 'Future Nostalgia (Remix)'. What's your favourite track from her?

angles.name: Celebrate Sensation
angles.copy: Dua Lipa is riding high at Number One! Turn it up loud and celebrate the latest chart sensation.
